titlestmt.titleproper: Guide to the School of Management, Yale University, Student Records
School of Management, Yale University, Student Records

controlnote.p: This encoded finding aid is compliant with the Yale EAD Best Practice Guidelines, Version 1.0.

descriptivenote.p: Finding aid description and metadata in Archives at Yale are licensed under a CC0 1.0 Universal (CC0 1.0) Public Domain Dedication. This means that anyone may copy, modify, and distribute this descriptive metadata without restriction or permission. The CC0 license is explained in full on the Creative Commons website: CC0 1.0 Universal (CC0 1.0) Public Domain Dedication. More information is available on our Help page.

maintenanceevent.eventdescription: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on Friday July 29, 2022 at 09:45

did.unittitle: School of Management, Yale University, student records
did.abstract: The records consist of student files maintained by the Yale School of Management (known as the School of Organization and Management prior to 1995).

odd.head: General note
odd.p: Forms part of Yale Record Group 30-F (YRG 30-F), Student records of the Yale School of Management.

acqinfo.head: Immediate Source of Acquisition
acqinfo.p: The records were transferred from the School of Management, 1991-2013.

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: The records are restricted. See inventory for details.
Some records in this finding aid have been redacted, as they include student names, donor names, and other restricted data. These records will not appear in the published finding aid.

prefercite.head: Preferred Citation
prefercite.p: School of Management, Yale University, Student Records for the Classes of 1978-2008 (RU 108). Manuscripts and Archives, Yale University Library.

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: The records are arranged by accession.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: The records consist of student files maintained by the Yale School of Management (known as the School of Organization and Management prior to 1995).

corpname.part: Yale University. School of Organization and Management
